name: Soil Contaminant Remediation
description: Remediating contaminated soil begins with site assessment to map the contaminant and plume, then branches by whether the contaminant is dissolved or sorbed: dissolved plumes are pumped and treated while sorbed contaminants are mobilized or degraded in situ, with treatment iterated until concentrations fall below cleanup targets.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Contaminated site"]
    N2["Site assessment + sampling"]
    N3["Identify contaminant + plume"]
    N4{"Sorbed or dissolved?"}
    N5["Dissolved: pump-and-treat"]
    N6["Sorbed: in-situ method"]
    N7["Mobilize / degrade"]
    N8["Treat extracted water"]
    N9{"Below cleanup target?"}
    N10["Continue / add reagent"]
    N11["Remediated soil"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 -->|dissolved| N5
    N4 -->|sorbed| N6
    N5 --> N8
    N6 --> N7
    N7 --> N8
    N8 --> N9
    N9 -->|no| N10
    N10 -->|repeat| N7
    N9 -->|yes| N11

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N11 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

sources.title: An overview and analysis of site remediation technologies
sources.authors: Khan, F. I.; Husain, T.; Hejazi, R.

sources.title: Environmental Organic Chemistry (3rd ed.)
sources.authors: Schwarzenbach, R. P.; Gschwend, P. M.; Imboden, D. M.

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.

flowchartStandard.name: source_grounded_extraction_v2
flowchartStandard.sourceGrounding: Nodes, decisions, branches, and loops were extracted from the cited sources; each node carries a sourceRef to its supporting citation. Awaiting human spot-check before verified=true.
